summary: Extend the empty-from exclusion in ListAwaitingReply to ALL modes, not just --external-only.
reason: Greptile P1 round-3 on PR #595: history.list stubs (rows inserted by ApplyHistoryDelta before a messages.get backfill) have empty from/subject/snippet, so default-mode awaiting-reply surfaced a useless `<blank> awaits your reply` row. The prior PATCH suppressed these only under --external-only on the grounds that a missing-from row could not be classified as external vs internal; the default mode kept them. Greptile flagged that even in default mode the row is noise. Extended the suppression to all modes. The cost is the same documented transient false negative (one poll cycle until backfill); the savings is no garbage row in the default response. The existing TestListAwaitingReplyExcludesEmptyFromUnderExternalOnly test was updated to assert the unbounded-mode exclusion too.
validated_outcome: go build / go vet / 566 tests / 17 packages green.
